originalTitle: 2 Reasons to Like CR (and 1 Not So Much)
summary: Crane currently trades at $173.48 per share and has shown little upside over the past six months, posting a small loss of 3%. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 11.3% gain during that period.
content:
Crane currently trades at $173.48 per share and has shown little upside over the past six months, posting a small loss of 3%. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 11.3% gain during that period.

Given the weaker price action, is now a good time to buy CR? Or should investors expect a bumpy road ahead? Find out in our full research report, it’s free .

Based in Connecticut, Crane (NYSE:CR) is a diversified manufacturer of engineered industrial products, including fluid handling, and aerospace technologies.

1. Projected Revenue Growth Is Remarkable

Forecasted revenues by Wall Street analysts signal a company’s potential. Predictions may not always be accurate, but accelerating growth typically boosts valuation multiples and stock prices while slowing growth does the opposite, though some deceleration is natural as businesses become larger.

Over the next 12 months, sell-side analysts expect Crane’s revenue to rise by 19.1%, an improvement versus its 3% annualized declines for the past five years. This projection is eye-popping and implies its newer products and services will spur better top-line performance.

2. EPS Surges Higher Over the Last Two Years

While long-term earnings trends give us the big picture, we also track EPS over a shorter period because it can provide insight into an emerging theme or development for the business.

Crane’s EPS grew at an astounding 21.8% compounded annual growth rate over the last two years, higher than its 9.6% annualized revenue growth. This tells us the company became more profitable on a per-share basis as it expanded.

Slow Organic Growth Suggests Waning Demand In Core Business

We can better understand General Industrial Machinery companies by analyzing their organic revenue. This metric gives visibility into Crane’s core business because it excludes one-time events such as mergers, acquisitions, and divestitures along with foreign currency fluctuations - non-fundamental factors that can manipulate the income statement.

Over the last two years, Crane’s organic revenue averaged 6.5% year-on-year growth. This performance slightly lagged the sector and suggests it may need to improve its products, pricing, or go-to-market strategy, which can add an extra layer of complexity to its operations.

Crane has huge potential even though it has some open questions. With its shares underperforming the market lately, the stock trades at 24× forward P/E (or $173.48 per share). Is now a good time to initiate a position? See for yourself in our in-depth research report, it’s free .

Stocks We Like Even More Than Crane

chineseTitle: 喜欢 CR 的 2 个理由（以及 1 个不太喜欢的理由）
chineseSummary: Crane 目前的交易价格为每股 173.48 美元，过去六个月几乎没有上涨空间，小幅下跌 3%。该股同期涨幅也低于标准普尔 500 指数 11.3% 的涨幅。
chineseContent:
Crane 目前的交易价格为每股 173.48 美元，过去六个月几乎没有上涨空间，小幅下跌 3%。该股同期涨幅也低于标准普尔 500 指数 11.3% 的涨幅。

鉴于价格走势疲软，现在是购买 CR 的好时机吗？或者投资者应该期待前方的道路崎岖不平？请在我们的完整研究报告中找到答案，它是免费的。

克瑞公司（纽约证券交易所股票代码：CR）总部位于康涅狄格州，是一家多元化的工程工业产品制造商，产品包括流体处理和航空航天技术。

1.预计收入增长显着

华尔街分析师预测的收入表明了公司的潜力。预测可能并不总是准确的，但加速增长通常会提高估值倍数和股价，而放缓增长则相反，尽管随着企业规模的扩大，一些减速是自然的。

在接下来的 12 个月中，卖方分析师预计 Crane 的收入将增长 19.1%，这比过去五年 3% 的年化下降有所改善。这一预测令人瞠目结舌，意味着其更新的产品和服务将刺激更好的营收业绩。

2. 过去两年每股收益飙升

虽然长期盈利趋势让我们了解全局，但我们还跟踪较短时期内的每股收益，因为它可以提供对新兴主题或业务发展的洞察。

过去两年，克瑞的每股收益复合年增长率达到惊人的 21.8%，高于其 9.6% 的年化收入增长率。这告诉我们，随着公司的扩张，每股盈利变得更加丰厚。

缓慢的有机增长表明核心业务的需求减弱

通过分析通用工业机械公司的有机收入，我们可以更好地了解它们。这一指标可以让人们了解克瑞的核心业务，因为它排除了合并、收购和资产剥离等一次性事件以及外币波动等可能操纵损益表的非基本因素。

过去两年，克瑞的有机收入平均同比增长 6.5%。这一表现略微落后于该行业，表明它可能需要改进其产品、定价或进入市场策略，这可能会为其运营增加额外的复杂性。

尽管有一些悬而未决的问题，但 Crane 仍具有巨大的潜力。由于其股价最近表现不佳，该股的预期市盈率为 24 倍（即每股 173.48 美元）。现在是开始建仓的好时机吗？请亲自查看我们的深入研究报告，它是免费的。

我们比起重机更喜欢的股票

当你在这里时：排名前九的跑赢市场的股票。最好的股票不会只跑赢市场一次。他们又这么做了。又来了。强劲的收入增长、不断增长的自由现金流、资本回报率让他们在竞争中遥遥领先。市场已经给这些企业带来了回报。

但我们的人工智能平台表示派对还没有结束。免费了解本周有哪些 9 只股票被下调。在这里免费获取我们排名前 9 的跑赢市场的股票。

进入我们名单的股票包括现在熟悉的名字，如 Nvidia（2020 年 6 月至 2025 年 6 月期间增长 1,326%），以及曾经不为人知的企业，如曾经的小盘股公司 Comfort Systems（五年回报率增长 782%）。立即通过 StockStory 寻找您的下一个大赢家。
